reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 1 (Dead Code): Function has 3 active callers (RPC handler rest_beacon_api.nim:1108, EL response processor nimbus_beacon_node.nim:2054, validator path beacon_validators.nim:587) - passes. Gate 2 (Trust Boundary): RPC handler path accepts kzg_proofs directly from external API requests (RestPublishedSignedBlockContents decoded from HTTP body) with no length validation before passing to assemble_data_column_sidecars. This is an UNTRUSTED entry point per bug bounty scope. EL paths are semi-trusted but RPC path confirms exploitability via P2P - passes. Gate 3 (Code Verification): Reading peerdas_helpers.nim:291-328 confirms line 328 performs unchecked indexed access `cell_proofs[i * CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB + j]` with no prior validation of cell_proofs.len. None of the three callers validate proof array size matches blobs.len * CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB before calling - passes. Gate 4 (Exploitability): An attacker can trigger this via RPC endpoint /eth/v2/beacon/blocks by submitting FuluSignedBlockContents with N blobs but fewer than N*CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB proofs, causing IndexDefect panic and node crash (DoS) - passes. Gate 5 (Spec Cross-Reference): 01e entry PROP-57888860-inv-027 in outputs/01e_PARTIAL_W3B4_1771748827.json lines 680-696 requires 'Each blob must produce exactly CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB cell-proof pairs in cells_and_kzg_proofs construction' with assertion 'len(result) == len(blobs) * CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB'. Code violates this requirement by not validating the invariant - passes. Gate 6 (Scope Check): Finding is Fusaka-specific (PeerDAS data columns), affects P2P/Consensus components, exploitable via single network packet/transaction, in-scope - passes. Severity: Original Medium severity is appropriate - single malformed RPC request can crash one node (>0.01% of network), meeting Low-to-Medium threshold. An attacker can trigger this via RPC endpoint /eth/v2/beacon/blocks by crafting a FuluSignedBlockContents with N blobs but M < N*CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB proofs, causing out-of-bounds access at line 328 and IndexDefect panic, resulting in node crash (DoS).
reviewed_items.spec_reference: Each blob must produce exactly CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB cell-proof pairs in cells_and_kzg_proofs construction (outputs/01e_PARTIAL_W3B4_1771748827.json, PROP-57888860-inv-027)
